projects.name: Agent Owner Action Board
projects.current_checkpoint: The Cursor Forum topic is publicly visible and starts the first valid exposure window for this project.
projects.blocker: The project now needs time for the visible Cursor Forum topic to collect replies and GitHub traffic before a demand decision.

owner_actions.where: Cursor Forum Showcase / Built for Cursor
owner_actions.what: Post the prepared Cursor Forum topic and provide the public topic URL.
owner_actions.why: Cursor Forum is a better-fit visible channel for agent workflow tools than the failed Reddit/HN attempts.

owner_actions.what: Check repo views, unique visitors, clones, stars, issues, comments, and Cursor Forum replies 24 hours after the topic went live.
owner_actions.why: The first demand read should be based on a valid visible exposure window.

next_review.reason: 24-hour read after the Cursor Forum topic became publicly visible
